Name: corporations
Description:
Equipment Rating: Average (Mercenaries)

Corporations care about the bottom line, which has advantages and disadvantages for mercenaries.  On the one hand, corporate executives recognize mercenaries as fellow independent businessmen and generally treat them with a degree of professional courtesy. On the other hand, they carefully weigh costs and benefits in every negotiation.
ReputationStatements: Time is money. In this case, quite literally.

MissionSuccessStatements: You solved a problem that would have required months of paperwork and politics.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: You left us with options. In business, options have value.
BadFaithFailureStatements: The accountants will eventually close the books on this. The reputational damage may linger much longer.
